global.title: Survey Sunday: How much home battery backup do YOU need?
global.summary: Home batteries are getting a lot of attention lately, but are people really looking for a full “whole home” setup, or are they just interested in keeping their phones alive for some post-hurricane doom scrolling? We asked you, our brilliant Electrek readers, what you were looking for in your home ba

global.title: Honda is bringing Mobile Power Pack e: battery swap tech to the US
global.summary: Honda brought its Mobile Power Pack e: swappable battery system to ACT Expo last week, where the brand announced plans to bring the swap system to market for B2B commercial integrations starting as early as June 2026. more…

global.title: E-quipment highlight: Kalmar li-ion Super Heavy electric forklifts
global.summary: Kalmar rolled out its first-ever li-ion-equipped electric “medium” forklift at last week’s ACT Expo – but Kalmar’s medium isn’t like your medium. Kalmar’s medium forklift trucks can hoist up to 40,000 lbs. And their biggest models can lift more than 4x that. (!) more…

global.title: Frankfurt expands commercial EV fleet with 10 new vocational trucks
global.summary: The German city is expanding its truck fleet with 10 new, specially upfitted examples of the Mercedes-Benz eEconic heavy-duty EVs, bringing the city’s total count of battery-electric low-floor trucks to 34. more…

global.title: More fun with a friend: Important tips for e-bike riding with two passengers
global.summary: One of the most underrated superpowers of electric bikes is the ability of many models to carry more than one person. Add a passenger kit and suddenly an e-bike stops being a solo commuter and starts acting like a genuine car replacement, passengers and cargo included. more…

global.title: Tesla postpones Model S/X Signature delivery event, leaving attendees holding the bag
global.summary: Tesla has postponed its highly anticipated Signature Edition delivery event that was scheduled for May 12 at the Fremont factory. The company sent a brief email to attendees today — just three days before the event — offering no explanation and no new date. The last-minute postponement is leaving bu

global.title: Turn your GM EV into backup battery power with a GM Energy Home System [Video]
global.summary: As a homeowner, one of the most frustrating things is when the power starts to flicker and go out. How long will it last this time? Generators and battery backups are always an option, but what if you could use another asset with a massive battery – your EV – to help provide power to your properly q

global.title: Get real: DeepWay delivered 8,020 electric semi trucks last year
global.summary: After a week of Tesla Semi grabbing headlines and stealing the show at ACT Expo, Baidu-backed DeepWay would like to remind you that they delivered 8,020 electric semi trucks in 2025 – and they’re almost ready to go public. more…

global.title: Porsche announces it is abandoning its major e-bike ambitions
global.summary: Porsche is pulling the plug on a major chunk of its electric bicycle ambitions, with the German automaker announcing plans to shut down its e-bike motor division and cut hundreds of jobs as it refocuses on its core sports car business. more…

global.title: At under $49,000, Volkswagen’s ID.Buzz might FINALLY be priced right
global.summary: Volkswagen aimed its all-electric ID.Buzz minivan squarely at an nostalgic baby boomer market that had aged out of $70,000 hippie nostalgia purchases by the time it arrived on US shores – but now VW that dealers are advertising the premium van for less than $49,000, VW’s new-age bus might be worth a
